info.name: CareTip API Security & Integration
info.description: Security-focused API tests: auth, tenant isolation, KYC gates, CRUD, platform protection, Stripe validation.

item.name: POST refresh — returns new access token

exec: if (!pm.environment.get('probeEmployeeId')) { pm.test.skip('No probe employee created'); return; }

item.name: GET stats B — compare to A

exec: if (pm.environment.get('hasManagerB') !== 'true') { pm.test.skip('Manager B not configured'); return; }

item.name: PATCH employee — manager A cannot patch foreign id
GET stats — requires approved KYC (verified manager)

exec: if (pm.environment.get('hasPendingManager') !== 'true') { pm.test.skip('No pending KYC account'); return; }

item.name: GET profile — pending KYC still allowed

exec: if (pm.environment.get('hasPendingManager') !== 'true') { pm.test.skip('No pending KYC account'); return; }
